name: Decadent Brownie Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Brand Creamy Chocolate Sweetened Condensed Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Bake pastry shell for 10 minutes; remove from oven.
3. Reduce oven temperature to 325°F.
4. In a saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate chips with butter or margarine.
5. In a mixer bowl, beat the chocolate mixture with condensed milk, biscuit baking mix, eggs, and vanilla until smooth.
6. Add nuts.
7. Pour into pastry shell.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until center is set.
9. Serve warm or at room temperature with vanilla ice cream.
10. Refrigerate leftovers.
